# FSharp.Data

## Docs

- [FSharp.Data: Data Access Made Simple](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/index.md)
- [CSV Parser](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/library/CsvFile.md)
- [CSV Type Provider](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/library/CsvProvider.md)
- [HTML CSS selectors](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/library/HtmlCssSelectors.md)
- [HTML Parser](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/library/HtmlParser.md)
- [HTML Type Provider](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/library/HtmlProvider.md)
- [HTTP Utilities](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/library/Http.md)
- [JSON Type Provider](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/library/JsonProvider.md)
- [Using JSON Schema with the JSON Type Provider](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/library/JsonSchema.md)
- [JSON Parser](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/library/JsonValue.md)
- [Type Inference and Missing Values](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/library/TypeInference.md)
- [WorldBank Provider](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/library/WorldBank.md)
- [XML Type Provider](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/library/XmlProvider.md)
- [Anonymizing JSON](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/tutorials/JsonAnonymizer.md)
- [Converting between JSON and XML](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/tutorials/JsonToXml.md)
